'''Malo''' was a [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] and an associate of [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]. He and another Rodian sometimes employed Solo to smuggle [[Spice/Legends|spice]]. Malo and his partner made one such exchange with Solo in [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], allowing [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Prison/Legends|prisoner]] [[Mira Volz]] to sneak aboard Solo's ''[[Millennium Falcon/Legends|Millennium Falcon]]''.<ref name="kessel" />

==Appearances==
